headline: 暑期档火热来袭，多部新片霸榜
headlineEn: Summer Blockbusters Heat Up, Multiple New Films Top Charts
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：暑期档竞争激烈，《痴迷》《火遮眼》领跑今日热搜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》《玩具总动员5》等新片本周上映，未来《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》备受期待。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: Summer season heats up with 'Obsession' and 'Eye of Fire' trending, new releases like 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'Toy Story 5' debut this week, and 'Spider-Man: Fresh Start' highly anticipated.

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，但3部新片蓄势待发
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, but 3 films set to debut this week

industryHighlights.text: 《福尔摩斯小姐3》跻身本周热搜前列
industryHighlights.en: 'Enola Holmes 3' ranks high in weekly trending

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》成最受期待新片
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Fresh Start' becomes most anticipated film

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》与《玩具总动员5》持续热度
